specific_question: Do returning customers cite warranty length as a reason for their repeat purchases from Elexion?
answer: Based on our 2025 tracking data of 20,132 customers who purchased another vehicle from Elexion within five years of purchasing their first, 16,562 cited the warranty length as a reason for doing so.
dr_question: With the reported slowdown in the sales of electric vehicles (EV), how can after sales products and customer service strategies help our company remain successful in 2026?
